specs.title: cp-000: When loading shows CircleNotch spinner 10px next to label
cp-001: Realtime uses useRealtimeIntegrity hook with 2-second debounce
cp-002: Hook requires minimum 100 characters minimum 10 character change between checks
cp-003: Realtime is active only when realtimeEnabled result disabled once full check run
cp-004: Button Run Integrity Check with Sparkle icon 16px
cp-005: Styled bg-brand text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3
cp-006: Disabled when loading or text 50 characters opacity 50
cp-007: While running button text changes to Analyzing
cp-008: Minimum 50 characters required shows error Please enter at least 50 characters o
cp-009: Request has 30-second abort timeout
cp-010: Error messages displayed as text-xs text-red-500 below textarea
cp-011: On timeout The check took too long Please try again with shorter text
cp-012: On network error Failed to connect to the analysis service Please try again
cp-013: Text split into paragraphs on nn before display
cp-014: Inline Split toggle two-button toggle group
cp-015: Inline button plain text
cp-016: Split button SplitHorizontal icon 13px label
cp-017: Active styled bg-brand text-white inactive text-ink-muted hovertext-ink
cp-018: Download Report button DownloadSimple icon 16px Download Report
cp-019: Check New Text link top-left of inline results resets all state result paragraph
cp-020: Glass panel container rounded-2xl padding 32px
cp-021: Engine badge if Binoculars engine shows purple pill Binoculars top-right
cp-022: Document title if from a document shown top-right in text-ink-muted
cp-023: Paragraphs with sentence-level breakdown highlight individual sentences
cp-024: Flags shown below paragraph as Flags comma-separated in text-10px text-ink-muted
cp-025: Humanize result appears inline below flagged paragraphs see section 17
cp-026: Two columns side by side with 16px gap
cp-027: Left column Original Text header uppercase tracking-wide
cp-028: Right column Annotated header with legend
cp-029: AI high red swatch bg-red-50015
cp-030: AI med amber swatch bg-amber-50010
cp-031: Plagiarism red swatch with underline bg-red-50010 underline decoration-red-500
cp-032: Citation issues render as inline Warning icons 12px filled
cp-033: Synchronized scrolling scrolling one column scrolls the other via requestAnimati
cp-034: Both columns render inside rounded-xl border border-border-subtle bg-surface-rai
